html:
2026-0505
2026-05-28NRCANCanada–Newfoundland and Labrador Atlantic Accord Implementation and Offshore Renewable Energy Management ActRegulations Amending the Canada-Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Area Petroleum Operations Framework Regulations Regulations Amending the Canada–Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Area Petroleum Operations Framework Regulations in order to (1) repeal section 83, which sets the limit on the volume of gas that the Regulator may authorize to be vented at an installation to be no greater than 15,000 standard m3 per year; and (2) allow the Regulator to authorize venting above that threshold that is required for safety inspections in accordance with the CSA, 2001.Registration: SOR/2026-0097 Publication Date: 2026-06-17
act: Canada–Newfoundland and Labrador Atlantic Accord Implementation and Offshore Renewable Energy Management Act
subject: Regulations Amending the Canada-Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Area Petroleum Operations Framework Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Canada–Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Area Petroleum Operations Framework Regulations in order to (1) repeal section 83, which sets the limit on the volume of gas that the Regulator may authorize to be vented at an installation to be no greater than 15,000 standard m3 per year; and (2) allow the Regulator to authorize venting above that threshold that is required for safety inspections in accordance with the CSA, 2001.
